title: UPUMS Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: UPUMS Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Check UPUMS B.Opt 1st and 2nd Year Time Table 2026 with complete exam dates, subject-wise schedule, and latest updates. Download the official UPUMS B.Opt exam timetable PDF easily.

content.text: Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences (UPUMS) has officially released the UPUMS Time Table 2026 for the B.Opt Supplementary and Carry Over Examination, April 2026. The exams for First Year and Second Year of B.Opt (Bachelor of Optometry), which were earlier scheduled to begin on 10 April 2026, have now been rescheduled to start from 13 April 2026. The complete schedule is available on the official website – https://www.upums.ac.in/. Students can download the official UPUMS Time Table 2026 PDF using their roll number or registration details from the examination portal. Always verify the dates and timings before appearing for the exams and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.

The UPUMS Time Table 2026 brings the rescheduled dates for B.Opt Supplementary and Carry Over examinations. This official notice covers the First Year and Second Year programs and has been issued by the Controller of Examinations, Dr. Rajesh Kumar Verma.
The morning session exams will be held from 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM. The Third Year supplementary exams will be conducted in the first week of May 2026 with a separate schedule.

rows: Uttar Pradesh University of Medical Sciences (UPUMS), Saifai, Etawah

content.text: The UPUMS Time Table 2026 Subject Wise gives a complete day-by-day schedule for the B.Opt Supplementary and Carry Over examinations. Students can now check the exact dates, days, paper codes, and subject papers for First Year and Second Year. All exams will be conducted in the morning session from 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM. This detailed subject-wise timetable helps candidates plan their revision and prepare effectively for the April 2026 examinations.

rows: Optometric Instruments & Clinical examination of Visual System

sections.heading: How to Download UPUMS Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can download the UPUMS Time Table 2026 directly from the official university website in a few simple steps. The official PDF contains the complete rescheduled schedule for B.Opt First Year and Second Year Supplementary/Carry Over exams.

items: Go to the official UPUMS website at https://www.upums.ac.in/.
Click on the “Examination” or “Notices” section available on the homepage.
Look for the latest notice titled “Rescheduled Examination Scheme UG (BOPT) Supplementary/Carry Over Examination, April-2026”.
Click on the link to open the official UPUMS Time Table 2026 PDF.
Download the file and save it on your device for easy reference.
Take a printout of the timetable and keep it handy while preparing for the exams.

content.text: Check the official timetable carefully and keep a copy for exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in UPUMS Time Table 2026

content.text: The UPUMS Time Table 2026 PDF includes all important information students need for the April 2026 supplementary and carry over examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the official document.

items: Official rescheduled dates for B.Opt First Year and Second Year examinations
Day-wise schedule starting from Monday, 13 April 2026
Complete list of paper codes and subject papers
Examination timing: 9:30 AM to 12:30 PM daily
Separate note for B.Opt Third Year exams in the first week of May 2026
Signature and seal of the Controller of Examinations, Dr. Rajesh Kumar Verma
Instructions regarding upload on the university website and notice board
Reference to the previous notice dated 04 April 2026
